transcript: Speaker A: I'm afraid to speak English at work. I have zero confidence. Speaker B: Many people feel this way! What makes you most afraid? Speaker A: I make mistake in meeting last year and everyone laugh. Now I never speak. Speaker B: One bad experience shouldn't stop you forever! You need to practice in a safe place first, with me. I am Loora your AI English tutor. I won't laugh, I'll help you. Speaker A: But how that give me confidence for real work? I been afraid for long time. Speaker B: The more you practice, the less scary it becomes. Most people feel confident after 3-4 weeks of daily practice. Let's start right now with something simple!
on_screen_text: I'm afraid to speak English at work. I have zero confidence. Many people feel this way! What makes you most afraid? I make mistake in meeting last year and everyone laugh. Now I never speak. One bad experience shouldn't stop you forever! You need to practice in a safe place first, with me. I am Loora your AI English tutor. I won't laugh, I'll help you. But how that give me confidence for real work? I been afraid for long time. The more you practice, the less scary it becomes. Most people feel confident after 3-4 weeks of daily practice. Let's start right now with something simple! Loora
summary: A split-screen ad where a human shares her fear of speaking English at work after being laughed at. An AI avatar named Loora introduces herself as a safe, judgment-free tutor to help build confidence through daily practice.
